data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the requirement 'AI learning from patterns', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided that confirms the system's ability to learn from patterns or any specific AI agent notes that demonstrate this learning. The absence of such evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of AI learning from patterns or related notes.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the AI learning from patterns.
